task: Write a Python function that lists all S3 buckets in an AWS account using boto3 and returns their names as a list of strings
Create a JSON configuration template for an AWS Lambda function deployment including function name, runtime, memory size, timeout, environment variables, and IAM role ARN

Write a regular expression that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules: 3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with a letter or number
